properties.notes: First ambient film report. 14 samples, Tc,onset 26.2-42.4K. Diamagnetic response confirmed.

evidence.summary: Resistivity vs temperature showing onset near 42.4 K on the best sample; 14 samples measured with onset range 26.2–42.4 K. Diamagnetic response confirmed by mutual-inductance susceptibility. Zero resistance not reached above 2 K.

properties.notes: Lowest onset Tc sample from same study.

evidence.summary: Resistivity vs temperature showing onset near 42.4 K on the best sample; 14 samples measured with onset range 26.2–42.4 K. Diamagnetic response confirmed by mutual-inductance susceptibility. Zero resistance not reached above 2 K.

properties.notes: La,Pr variant. Ambient pressure. GAE (Gigantic-Anion Enhanced) non-equilibrium synthesis route — explicit metastable route annotation.

evidence.summary: Pr-substituted RP bilayer nickelate film on SLAO. R(T) curves report onset near 40 K with substantial resistance drop; diamagnetic screening observed in ac susceptibility. Substrate-film strain ~-1.7%.

properties.notes: Record ambient onset Tc. Extreme non-equilibrium GAE growth. Strange-metal α~1 at highest Tc. Explicit metastable route annotation (non-equilibrium synthesis).
Strain-tuning study. Partially relaxed. Under 20GPa: onset ~60K.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 thin film grown by PLD on LaAlO3. Sakakibara/Kuroki group. Compressive strain ~-2.1%. R(T) shows no clear superconducting transition at ambient pressure; under ~20 GPa signatures near 10 K. XRD confirms c-axis orientation.

properties.notes: Tensile strained. Under 20GPa: onset ~28K.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 film on NdGaO3. Intermediate strain. Broad resistance anomaly below 30 K without a clean zero-resistance state. XRD confirms RP-327 phase.

properties.notes: Tensile strained, no SC at ambient. Under 20GPa: onset ~10K.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 film on SrTiO3. Sakakibara/Kuroki. Tensile strain ~+0.4% destroys the ambient-pressure superconducting response; R(T) shows no onset. Under ~20 GPa pressure Tc_onset ~10 K recovers. XRD confirms Ruddlesden-Popper phase.

properties.notes: BKT-like transition. TBKT=9K. ~2% compressive strain confirmed by STEM.

evidence.summary: Epitaxial Pr-doped La3Ni2O7 film on SLAO. Onset Tc ~48 K with partial resistance drop; no zero-resistance plateau above 2 K. XRD confirms RP-327 phase with c-axis locked to substrate.

properties.notes: Sr doping study. Jc > 1.4 kA/cm² at 2K. μ₀Hc∥(0) = 83.7T. Superconducting dome found.

evidence.summary: Epitaxial Pr-doped La3Ni2O7 film on SLAO. Onset Tc ~48 K with partial resistance drop; no zero-resistance plateau above 2 K. XRD confirms RP-327 phase with c-axis locked to substrate.

properties.notes: Under 0.3GPa: 62K onset. Under 2.0GPa: 68.5K onset (see id=15). Resistance dip linked to oxygen vacancies.
Compressively strained bilayer nickelate film under pressure. Tc,onset 48.5 K at 7 GPa (Fig. 3f). Related higher-pressure data point from same paper: 61.5 K at 9 GPa — see id=23.
1212 and 2323 superstructures SC at 46-50K onset. 1313 NOT SC. γII hole pocket at zone corner is required for SC.

evidence.summary: Nickelate superlattice thin films on SLAO from Hwang group. Onset Tc ~60 K in best superstructures. Resistance drops sharply below 60 K with diamagnetic response confirmed in selected samples.

properties.notes: SUPERCONDUCTING DOME mapped. Tc stable for x=0-0.21, suppressed near x≈0.38. Hall sign change at optimal doping — electron-hole crossover like cuprates. T-linear resistivity beyond dome.
Jc > 1.4 kA/cm² at 2K. μ₀Hc∥(0) = 83.7T, μ₀Hc⊥(0) = 110.3T. KEY FINDING: O vacancies on PLANAR NiO₂ sites in films (vs APICAL in bulk) — strain shifts vacancy site preference.

evidence.summary: Epitaxial Pr-doped La3Ni2O7 film on SLAO. Onset Tc ~48 K with partial resistance drop; no zero-resistance plateau above 2 K. XRD confirms RP-327 phase with c-axis locked to substrate.

properties.notes: Film + 2.0 GPa pressure: onset 68.5K (up from 62K at 0.3 GPa). Resistance dip above SC transition = oxygen vacancy indicator. Pressure delocalizes trapped electrons at vacancy sites.
Under 20 GPa pressure. Compressive strain + pressure yields 60K. c/a ratio is the key parameter.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 thin film grown by PLD on LaAlO3. Sakakibara/Kuroki group. Compressive strain ~-2.1%. R(T) shows no clear superconducting transition at ambient pressure; under ~20 GPa signatures near 10 K. XRD confirms c-axis orientation.

properties.notes: Tensile strained film under 20 GPa. Even tensile films superconduct under enough pressure.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 film on NdGaO3. Intermediate strain. Broad resistance anomaly below 30 K without a clean zero-resistance state. XRD confirms RP-327 phase.

properties.notes: Tensile film under 20 GPa: only 10K. Confirms tensile strain is strongly detrimental.

evidence.summary: La3Ni2O7 film on SrTiO3. Sakakibara/Kuroki. Tensile strain ~+0.4% destroys the ambient-pressure superconducting response; R(T) shows no onset. Under ~20 GPa pressure Tc_onset ~10 K recovers. XRD confirms Ruddlesden-Popper phase.

properties.notes: First signatures of SC near 80K at 14-43 GPa.

evidence.summary: Bulk La3Ni2O7 under ~15 GPa pressure. Tc ~80 K with resistance drop and diamagnetic signature. Ambient-pressure phase non-superconducting. Sun et al. original bulk claim.

properties.notes: Zero resistance confirmed in single crystals under pressure.
CONFIRMED bulk HTSC: onset 82.5K, zero-R 60K, 97% shielding.
New bulk Tc record in pressurized nickelate single crystals.
Same paper as id=11 (arXiv:2507.10399). Higher-pressure data point: Tc,onset 61.5 K at 9 GPa. Substrate / growth_method / film lattice params not verified from abstract — flagged for review.
Classic ambient-pressure high-Tc benchmark
Newest ambient-pressure record (2026)
Canonical high-Tc oxide, rich doping behavior

Strong pressure/interfacial effects
Chemically tunable iron-based family
Strong electron-phonon coupling benchmark
Classic conventional baseline
Very high Tc, extreme pressure only
Flagship ultrahigh-pressure hydride
Interface-enhanced Tc from 8K to 65K; up to 109K reported in situ
Bulk FeSe Tc jumps from 8K to 37K under moderate pressure
First discovered iron-based superconductor family

properties.structure: Layered iron pnictide (1111 family, Sm variant)
properties.notes: Highest bulk Tc among all iron-based superconductors
First superconducting nickelate; cuprate analog discovered 2019
Tc ~80K at 14-43 GPa; second material family above liquid N₂ temp
Onset Tc 26-42K at ambient via strain; zero-R at ~2K (defects limit)
Z₂ topological kagome metal; CDW competes with SC

properties.structure: Layered kagome lattice; isostructural to CsV₃Sb₅
properties.notes: Similar CDW physics to CsV₃Sb₅ at lower Tc

properties.structure: Layered kagome lattice; isostructural to CsV₃Sb₅
properties.notes: Topological charge order discovered in this member
Among the highest ambient-pressure Tc cuprates
First high-Tc superconductor discovered (1986)
High Tc without requiring La; different cage structure than H₃S
Sodalite cage structure; lighter element than La/Y
Rare spin-triplet superconductor; topological SC candidate
Falsified — Cu2S impurity resistivity drop
requires ~150 GPa; ambient phase non-SC
